---
about:
  template: jolla
  id: about-block
  image: "img/my_image.jpg"
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/MarvinSchmittML
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/marvinschmitt
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/marvin-schmitt-a85b321a2/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:mail.marvinschmitt@gmail.com"  
---

::: {#about-block}
:::

# About Me

Add your personal introduction here. Tell visitors about yourself, your background, interests, and what you do. This is your opportunity to make a great first impression!

**Feel free to customize this section with:**
- Your professional background
- Your interests and passions
- Your current projects or work
- Any other information you'd like to share

For more information about my work and projects, explore the [Projects](projects/) and [Photography](photography/) sections. You can also check out my [CV](cv/) for more details.

Feel free to [contact me](mailto:mail.marvinschmitt@gmail.com) if you have any questions or would like to collaborate!
